title: LLB Jobs 2026 – Law Officer
shortInfo: Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Law Officer (Contractual). Candidates with LLB Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through MPSC official website.

basic_details.job_title: MPSC Law Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Law Officer (Contractual). Candidates with LLB Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through MPSC official website.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MPSC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Law Graduate from recognized university, Enrolled advocate, Minimum 5 years experience as advocate in Maharashtra Administrative Tribunal/High Court, Knowledge of Marathi, Hindi and English
qualification.details: Law Graduate from a recognized university. Enrolled advocate. Minimum 5 years of experience as an advocate in the Maharashtra Administrative Tribunal or High Court. Knowledge of Marathi, Hindi, and English.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://mpsc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the MPSC Law Officer (Contractual) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the MPSC Law Officer (Contractual) recruitment is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Law Officer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Law Officer (Contractual) position, candidates must be a Law Graduate from a recognized university and an enrolled advocate with at least 5 years of experience.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this MPSC Law Officer (Contractual) recruitment.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the Law Officer (Contractual) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Law Officer (Contractual) post is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Law Officer (Contractual) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Law Officer (Contractual) post will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 78,000 per month, along with an additional allowance of Rs. 8,000 for telephone, travel, stationery, and xerox.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Law Officer (Contractual) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Law Officer (Contractual) position announced by the Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the MPSC Law Officer (Contractual) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Law Officer (Contractual) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Law Officer (Contractual) position primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility and submitted documents.

faq.question: Which languages are required for the Law Officer (Contractual) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Law Officer (Contractual) post must have knowledge of Marathi, Hindi, and English languages to be considered eligible for the role.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission (MPSC) at mpsc.gov.in. It is crucial to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
